ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "provider" INTEGER /* Provider of the cookie */,
  "purpose" INTEGER /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "expiry" INTEGER /* Expiry of the cookie */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the cookie */,
  "is_third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is set by a third-party service */,
  "is_necessary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is necessary for the website to function */,
  "is_opt_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can opt-out of the cookie */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the cookie's details */,
  "data_collected" TEXT /* Description of the data collected by the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_expiry FOREIGN KEY ("expiry") REFERENCES expiry_types ("expiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provider is active */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last time the provider was checked for compliance */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, SDK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purpose is mandatory for the website to function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiry_types" (
  "expiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiry type */,
  "expiry_name" TEXT /* Name of the expiry type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiry type */,
  "is_persistent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expiry type is persistent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie type is secure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is active */,
  "last_audited" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last audit of the website */,
  "gdpr_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is GDPR compliant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_cookies" (
  "website_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website-cookie relationship */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website using the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie used by the website */,
  "is_opt_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can opt-out of the cookie on the website */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is mandatory for the website to function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_cookies_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES client_websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., visitor, customer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last activity of the user */,
  "gdpr_consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has given GDPR consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cookies" (
  "user_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-cookie relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie set on the user's device */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was set */,
  "is_opt_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has opted out of the cookie */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is mandatory for the website to function */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the user-cookie relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cookies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  "is_revocable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the consent can be revoked */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consents_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public */,
  "last_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last generation of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES client_websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience of the campaign */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Description of the goal of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_cookies" (
  "campaign_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-cookie relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign using the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie used in the campaign */,
  "is_opt_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can opt-out of the cookie in the campaign */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is mandatory for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_cookies_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
